sizing_rule.note: Risk fixed 1.5% of capital per trade with 2.0% initial protection stop. Position size derived from: (max_risk_per_trade_pct / initial_protection_pct) × position_size_pct = risk allocation. Van Tharp 1R concept: stop distance (2.0%) determines position scale relative to capital allocation (2.0%), capped at 1.5% max risk per trade.

source_rule_text: Position sizing must incorporate two factors from the snow fight metaphor: initial protection level and starting capital allocation, because money management (not entry selection) is the primary driver of trading performance.
